title: poa alpina subsp. legionensis
intro: Poa alpina subsp. legionensis, a subspecies of the Poa alpina plant, is a type of grass native to the Iberian Peninsula. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Poa alpina subsp. legionensis include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and promote a healthy sleep pattern. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infused oil, and is also used in herbal supplements to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
